name: Oyster Souffle Base
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the butter and seasonings in a heavy-bottom saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add celery, green onions, white onions, green peppers, and minced oysters to the pan. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
3. Gradually add oyster water and whole oysters, stirring occasionally. Simmer for 12 to 15 minutes.
4. Gradually incorporate flour into the mixture, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon until it begins to thicken and pull away from the sides of the pan.
5. Continue cooking while stirring for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Beat in egg yolks one at a time using a wooden spoon.
7. Whip egg whites with high speed until stiff peaks form.
8. When ready to serve, combine the cooled base with meringue.
